versions.version_description: This version is a little more accurate and included the orchestra intro.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: When You Say Nothing At All
Two Less Lonely People In The World

content:
...SHE'S OUT OF MY LIFE... by Michael Jackson
--------------------------...................

*from 'Off the Wall' (1979)*


*CAPO 2nd FRET*

(Original Key: E)


Intro:

[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] (x2)

Verse 1:

[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 She's out of my life,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fdim7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Fdim7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 She's out of my life.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]A/G[/ch]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 And I don't know whether, to laugh or cry,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]C#m7b5[/ch]  [ch]F#7b9[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I don't know whether,   to live or die.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
And it cuts like a knife;[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7/A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
She's out of my life.[/tab]

Verse 2:

[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
 It's out of my hands,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fdim7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Fdim7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 It's out of my hands.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]A/G[/ch]        [ch]F#m7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 To think; for two years, she was here,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7b5[/ch]         [ch]F#7b9[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]
 And I took her for granted; I was so    cava-lier.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
Now the way that it stands;[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7/A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
She's out of my hands.[/tab]

Bridge 1:

[tab][ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
 So I've learned that, love's not pos-session,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]
 And I've learned that, love won't wait.[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]F#7b9[/ch] [ch]F#7[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
 Now I've learned that, loves needs ex-pression,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
But I learned, too late.   And she's...[/tab]

Verse 3:

[tab][ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
        Out of my life,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fdim7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Fdim7[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]
 She's out of my life.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]A/G[/ch]    [ch]F#m7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 Damned inde-cision, and cursed pride,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]C#m7b5[/ch]       [ch]F#7b9[/ch]   [ch]F#7[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
 I kept my love for her, locked deep in-side.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
And it cuts like a knife;[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7/A[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
She's out of my...[/tab]

Outro:

[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  A/G, [ch]D9[/ch]
 Life...[/tab]


CHORD DIAGRAMS:
---------------

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
